hotel.name: The Vine Hotel
hotel.address: Rua das Aranhas No. 27-A, Funchal, Madeira 9000-044 Portugal
hotel.review_summary: Boutique wine-concept hotel with exceptional central location; standout breakfast and personable staff; panoramic Funchal views from the rooftop pool.

hotel_alt.name: Hotel Madeira
hotel_alt.review_summary: Well-located 3-star with personalized service; rooftop pool offers sweeping city views; best value option in central Funchal.

daily_plan.note: Arrival — flight lands 10:40. Afternoon: self-guided walk along Funchal waterfront and Zona Velha.

am.title: Old Funchal Walking Tour
am.description: Guided walk through Funchal's historic old town — cobbled alleys, tilework facades, Mercado dos Lavradores.

pm.title: Dolphin and Whale Watching — Ecological Catamaran
pm.description: Three-hour catamaran cruise off Funchal's coast — sperm whales, bottlenose dolphins, and migrating blue and fin whales in May.

am.title: Full-Day Rabaçal Levada Walk
am.description: Full-day guided levada into Rabaçal valley — UNESCO laurisilva forest, moss-draped laurel canopy, 25 Fontes twin waterfalls.

am.title: West Tour — Fanal Forest & Porto Moniz Volcanic Pools
am.description: Small-group tour: fog-shrouded ancient Fanal laurisilva forest, centuries-old til trees, then north coast to Porto Moniz natural lava pools.

am.title: Hidden Corners: Levada Walk
am.description: Off-beat levada route through Madeira's lesser-visited interior — narrow irrigation channels and viewpoints known mostly to locals.

am.title: Whale & Dolphin Watching — Calheta
am.description: Highest-rated whale watch on Madeira — small boat from Calheta marina, reliably close encounters with sperm whales and common dolphins.

daily_plan.note: Free day — suggested: Monte Palace Tropical Garden by cable car, toboggan wicker baskets back to Funchal, evening in Zona Velha.
Last full day. Morning espetada at Mercado dos Lavradores, afternoon waterfront walk.
